page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, and the system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the ecs.c6.2xlarge delivers average multi-core CPU capabilities and memory bandwidth. In stress-ng multi-core tests and PassMark CPU evaluations, the instance scores in the middle 50% tier. Similarly, memory bandwidth tests for both cached small blocks and uncached large blocks fall within the average range, as do database operations and Redis SET operations. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests, gzip compression, and bzip3 decompression benchmarks scoring in the bottom 25% tier.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio position this instance as a resource-dense option for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The inclusion of AVX-512 and AVX-512_VNNI instruction sets provides hardware acceleration for vector calculations. This hardware profile is best suited for workloads such as static web serving, multi-threaded batch processing, and medium-scale database operations where multi-core scaling can offset the weaker single-core performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio without local storage or GPU resources. Benchmark data shows average multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations, though single-core performance and compression tasks fall into the lower tier. The processor supports AVX-512 instruction sets, enhancing vector processing capabilities. Qualitatively, the instance offers a cost-efficient profile for compute-focused workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores. It is suitable for static web serving, multi-threaded processing, and database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for database and web serving workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for multi-threaded workloads.
